goal: opposite_mul(x.val, opposite_mul(y.val, z.val)) = opposite_mul(opposite_mul(x.val, y.val), z.val)

p.c: not forall(x0: MulOpposite[M], x1: MulOpposite[M], x2: MulOpposite[M]) { x0 * (x1 * x2) = x0 * x1 * x2 }
exists(k0: MulOpposite[M], k1: MulOpposite[M], k2: MulOpposite[M]) { k0 * (k1 * k2) != k0 * k1 * k2 }
let w0: MulOpposite[M] satisfy { exists(k0: MulOpposite[M], k1: MulOpposite[M]) { w0 * (k0 * k1) != w0 * k0 * k1 } }
let w1: MulOpposite[M] satisfy { exists(k2: MulOpposite[M]) { w0 * (w1 * k2) != w0 * w1 * k2 } }
let w2: MulOpposite[M] satisfy { w0 * (w1 * w2) != w0 * w1 * w2 }
let w3: MulOpposite[M] satisfy { exists(k3: MulOpposite[M]) { w0 * (w3 * k3) != w0 * w3 * k3 } }
let w4: MulOpposite[M] satisfy { w0 * (w3 * w4) != w0 * w3 * w4 }
let w5: MulOpposite[M] satisfy { w0 * (w3 * w5) != w0 * w3 * w5 }
function[T0: Semigroup](x0: MulOpposite[T0], x1: MulOpposite[T0], x2: MulOpposite[T0]) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[M](w0, w3, w5)

goal: Mul.mul(Mul.mul(x, y), z) = x * y * z

p.c: function[T0: Mul](x0: MulOpposite[T0], x1: MulOpposite[T0]) { Mul.mul[MulOpposite[T0]](x0, x1) = x0 * x1 }[M](x * y, z)

goal: Mul.mul(x, Mul.mul(y, z)) = Mul.mul(Mul.mul(x, y), z)
